name: @clearline/domain-cards
description: Pure, framework-agnostic virtual-card rules (US-CW-014): derived remaining-limit computation (never stored), MCC allow-list checks, the single authorizeCardTransaction gate (security hold → freeze → MCC → limit), the security-gating layer that collapses sensitive declines to one generic cardholder message, and the transaction-feed exponential reconnect backoff. No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/payments.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-008 (US-CW-014 Virtual Card Issuance & Real-Time Controls).
